title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN MANUEL NORTE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO DR. MANUEL T. CASES SR. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 439; 112 OG No. 16, 2429 (April 18, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10748, March 07, 2016 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN MANUEL NORTE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO DR. MANUEL T. CASES SR. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of an Elementary School.

â The name of San Manuel Norte Elementary School in the Municipality of Agoo, Province of La Union is hereby changed to Dr. Manuel T. Cases Sr. Elementary School.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus.

â The main campus of the Dr. Manuel T. Cases Sr. Elementary School shall continue to remain in its present location in the Municipality of Agoo, Province of La Union.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 4, 2014 and December 7, 2015, respectively.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

MAR 07 2016

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
